overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a scenic riverside canyon environment during golden hour. The character walks along rocky trails and grassy banks beside a flowing river, passing through red rock formations and interacting with a campfire structure before stopping at the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky trail between cliff face and river

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along a narrow rocky path between a tall cliff wall and the river, moving toward the light

entered.detail: large layered red rock outcropping with vertical striations
flowing river with sun reflections on the surface
hazy rock formations visible across the river in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character walking along a narrow gravel path sandwiched between a towering red rock cliff on the left and a flowing river on the right. The golden hour sun creates long shadows and warm lighting across the scene, with sparse dry vegetation dotting the rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with red and gold vegetation near river

events.description: exits narrow cliffside path into open grassland area with tall red grasses

agents.ego_description: character jogging through tall grass and red vegetation, moving away from the cliff wall toward open terrain

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown grass covering the open ground
solitary trees with green foliage dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow canyon into a wide-open grassland bathed in golden sunlight. The terrain shifts from rocky gravel to soft grass with distinctive red and gold hues, while the river now flows to the left and the imposing cliff face recedes into the background.

events.description: character approaches wooden campfire structure and interacts with it, creating a visible puff of smoke
character resumes walking along the riverbank after brief interaction with the campfire

agents.ego_description: character stops at a wooden campfire structure, interacts with it causing a smoke burst, then continues along the rocky shore

entered.detail: primitive wooden teepee-like structure made of stacked logs with smoke rising from it
white smoke burst created by the character's interaction with the campfire

segments.scene_description: Approaching a riverside campsite, the character interacts with a wooden log structure, causing a burst of smoke, then continues along the rocky shoreline. The environment features mixed grass and rock terrain with the river flowing closely on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with ancient rock formations

events.description: character stops at the water's edge and stands looking across the river

agents.ego_description: character walks along the rocky riverbank and stops at the water's edge, standing still and looking out over the river toward the distant formations

entered.detail: large leafy tree with full green canopy near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a rocky shore beside the river, passing a large green tree, and coming to a stop at the water's edge. The character stands looking out across the river toward the majestic rock formations in the distance as the golden light illuminates the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, shadowed canyon into a wide, sun-drenched riverside basin. It begins with the character walking along a gravel path squeezed between a towering red rock cliff and a flowing river under the warm glow of the golden hour. As the path opens up, the terrain shifts from rocky gravel to expansive grasslands of red and gold hues, while the imposing cliff face recedes into the background. The scene then leads the character toward a riverside campsite where a burst of smoke rises from a wooden log structure before the path turns back toward the rocky shoreline. Finally, the camera follows the character past a large green tree to a stop at the water's edge, looking out across the river toward majestic distant rock formations illuminated by the fading sunlight.
